externalDocs.description: OData Service for Business Partner Create, Read, and Update

info.title: Master Data for Business Partner
info.description:
You can use this service to read, create, and update business partner in SAP Business Technology Platform. The service enables you to do the following:
-	Search can be performed on Business Partner entity using the following attributes:
    -	BusinessPartner: Key identifying a unique business partner. The key is unique within a tenant.
    -	FullName: Complete name of the business partner.
       -	SearchTerm1: Denotes the term that you define for a business partner, and via which you can restrict the search for a business partner in the business partner search or in the locator.
    -	SearchTerm2: Denotes the term that you define for a business partner, and via which you can restrict the search for a business partner in the business partner search or in the locator.
-	Read API can be used to retrieve the complete Business Partner entity (deep read) along with its associated entities
-	Create API can be used to create a complete Business Partner (deep insert). In case deep insert is not required, root entity  can be created first and then child entities can be created by navigating from the parent entity. Child entities can be created only by navigating via the parent entity.
-	Update API can be used to update the Business Partner entity or any of its associated entities.

BillingIsBlockedForCustomer.description: Indicates if the processing of billing documents is blocked for the customer in all sales areas (company-wide, for example).

CustomerClassification.description: Specifies a classification of the customer (for example, classifies the customer as a bulk purchaser).

DeliveryIsBlockedForCustomer.description: Indicates if delivery processing is blocked for the customer in all sales areas (company-wide, for example).

NielsenRegion.description: Specifies a regional division according to the market categories created by the A. C. Nielsen company.

SalesOrganization.description: An organizational unit responsible for the sale of certain products or services. The responsibility of a sales organization may include legal liability for products and customer claims.

DistributionChannel.description: The way in which products or services reach the customer. Typical examples of distribution channels are wholesale, retail, or direct sales.

Division.description: A way of grouping materials, products, or services. The system uses divisions to determine the sales areas and the business areas for a material, product, or service.

IsMarkedForDeletion.description: Indicates that all data in the master record will be deleted for the specified sales area. Before the deletion is made, the system checks for dependent data that would prevent the deletion.

OrderIsBlockedForCustomer.description: Indicates if further sales order processing is blocked for the customer. The block applies throughout the specified sales area.

DeliveryIsBlockedForCustomer.description: Indicates if further delivery processing is blocked for the customer. The block applies throughout the specified sales area.

BillingIsBlockedForCustomer.description: Indicates if further billing activities are blocked for the customer. The block applies throughout the specified sales area.

CompleteDeliveryIsDefined.description: Indicates whether a sales order must be delivered completely in a single delivery or whether the order can be partially delivered and completed over a number of deliveries.

PartialDeliveryIsAllowed.description: Specifies whether the customer requires full or partial delivery for the item.

IncotermsClassification.description: Commonly used trading terms that comply with the standards established by the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC).

IncotermsTransferLocation.description: Additional information for the primary Incoterm.

Currency.description: Customers currency for a sales area. This currency will be used to settle the customers charges for the given sales organization.

PaymentTerms.description: Key for defining payment terms composed of cash discount percentages and payment periods.

CustomerPriceGroup.description: A grouping of customers who share the same pricing requirements.

CustomerGroup.description: Identifies a particular group of customers (for example, wholesale or retail) for the purpose of pricing or generating statistics.

DeliveryPriority.description: The delivery priority assigned to an item.

SalesGroup.description: A group of sales people who are responsible for processing sales of certain products or services.

SalesOffice.description: A physical location (for example, a branch office) that has responsibility for the sale of certain products or services within a given geographical area.
